description: Fraudulent stock market tips, pump-and-dump messages, fake SEBI advisor claims or paid trading signal groups that manipulate victims into buying shares, paying subscription fees or sharing trading credentials.
recommended_actions: Do not trade based only on unsolicited tips from SMS, WhatsApp or Telegram.
Verify any investment advisor through SEBI's official intermediary records.
Do not share demat, broker login, OTP or trading account credentials.
Preserve messages, group links, advisor names, payment receipts and trade screenshots.
Report financial fraud immediately by calling 1930 if money was lost.

rules.name: Guaranteed Intraday Profit
rules.explanation: Claims certain profits from stock tips, which legitimate advisors cannot guarantee.
examples: Sure shot intraday call. Guaranteed profit today.
Buy now. Target hit in 30 minutes.

rules.name: Telegram WhatsApp Stock Group
rules.explanation: Uses messaging groups to broadcast tips, fake profit screenshots or manipulated recommendations.
examples: Join our premium Telegram channel for operator calls.
VIP WhatsApp group gives daily jackpot stocks.

rules.name: SEBI Registration Claim
rules.explanation: Claims SEBI registration or advisor status without verifiable registration details.
examples: We are SEBI registered advisors. Pay for premium calls.
Certificate attached. Join paid stock tips plan.

rules.name: Pump and Dump Recommendation
rules.explanation: Pushes victims to buy low-liquidity or penny stocks that may be manipulated for pump-and-dump fraud.
examples: Operator active. Buy this penny stock before upper circuit.
Hidden gem will become multibagger today.

rules.name: Paid Signal Subscription
rules.explanation: Requests payment for trading tips or signals using unverifiable performance claims.
examples: Pay monthly package fee for premium calls.
Trial call was successful. Renew package to continue.

rules.name: Demat or Broker Credential Request
rules.explanation: Attempts to obtain access to the victim's trading or demat account.
examples: Share your broker login so our expert can trade for you.
Send TPIN and OTP to execute profitable trade.

rules.name: Fake Profit Screenshot
rules.explanation: Uses screenshots of alleged client profits to lure victims into trades or paid tip services.
examples: See today's client profit screenshot. Join now.
We recovered all losses for our members.

rules.name: Loss Recovery Promise
rules.explanation: Targets people who lost money by promising recovery through paid tips or account access.
examples: We can recover your trading loss in one week.
Join special recovery call and double your capital.

rules.name: Urgent Buy Sell Pressure
rules.explanation: Applies time pressure so the victim trades without checking the source or risk.
examples: Buy now before market closing. Do not miss.
Entry now. Only few minutes left.
